title: Sqlitelogictest: select query with NOT IN giving wrong results
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0 (col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT ALL - ( - COUNT ( * ) ) FROM tab0 AS cor0 WHERE col0 / ( - + col2 ) NOT IN ( + + col0, + col0 * + ( col1 ), + ( + - col0 ) * - 45, + CAST ( NULL AS INTEGER ) );
key_bug_features: SELECT query with NOT IN returning incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 100, 'First entry'), (2, NULL, 'Second entry'), (3, 200, 'Third entry');
CREATE TABLE reference_table (ref_id INTEGER, ref_value INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT ref_value FROM reference_table WHERE ref_id < 3) OR description IS NULL;
